startPoint.en: Talk to Baba Yaga on Lunar Isle.
startPoint.es: Habla con Baba Yaga en Lunar Isle.

items.name: Melee
items.display: Weapons for the Melee, Ranged and Magic combat styles

items.name: Blast spells
items.display: All four elemental spells: Blast, Wave, or Surge spells recommended

recommended.name: Armour
recommended.display: Armour that provides minimal penalties to Ranged or Magic but still has good defensive properties. Hybrid armour is recommended because style switching is required

rewards.name: Balmung
rewards.display: The Balmung, a two-handed melee weapon with special passive abilities when used against dagannoths (enhanced through the Koschei's Troubles miniquest); 25% (45%) extra damage with auto attacks (15% (35%) against Dagannoth Supreme) 12.5% (22.5%) extra damage with with abilities (7.5% (17.5%) against Dagannoth Supreme) 30% (45%) increase in hit chance
450,000 experience (3x 150,000 experience) in either Attack, Defence, Strength, Constitution, Ranged, Magic or Prayer (Skill must be level 75 or higher; speak to Chieftain Brundt to receive this)

rewards.name: Dagannoth Mother (Blood Runs Deep)
rewards.display: Both the Dagannoth Mother and her sentinels can be faced in the Dominion Tower

text.en: Talk to Baba Yaga on Lunar Isle about the man in the bed.
text.es: Habla con Baba Yaga en Lunar Isle sobre el hombre en la cama.

chatOptions: 1 Talk about the man in the bed.
1 Is there anything we can do?

text.en: Talk to Baba Yaga again to go to the Dream World.
text.es: Vuelve a hablar con Baba Yaga para ir al Dream World.

chatOptions: 1 Talk about the man in the bed.

text.en: Listen Silas.
text.es: Escucha a Silas.

text.en: Search the bookcase to obtain a prophecy tablet.
text.es: Registra la estantería para obtener una tablilla de profecía.

text.en: Climb the stairs.
text.es: Sube las escaleras.

text.en: Eavesdrop-on Silas and continue through the tunnel.
text.es: Escucha a escondidas a Silas y continúa por el túnel.

chatOptions: 1 She didn't count on us finding out.

text.en: Talk to Silas.
text.es: Habla con Silas.

chatOptions: 1 I'm a friend of your nephew.

text.en: Read Our Lives.
text.es: Lee Our Lives.

text.en: Prepare to face multiple (4-7) Dagannoth and Wallasalki at a time. This will go on for a few minutes.
text.es: Prepárate para enfrentarte a varios (4-7) Dagannoth y Wallasalki a la vez. Esto durará unos minutos.

text.en: Do not use your dwarf multicannon in this area or you will lose it.
text.es: No uses tu cañón enano en esta zona o lo perderás.

text.en: Talk to Baba Yaga to be teleported to Rellekka.
text.es: Habla con Baba Yaga para ser teletransportado a Rellekka.

chatOptions: 1 Talk about the man in the bed.

text.en: Prepare to face many Dagannoth.
text.es: Prepárate para enfrentarte a muchos Dagannoth.

text.en: After killing sufficient Dagannoth, Brundt the Chieftain will command you to get onto his boat.
text.es: Tras matar suficientes Dagannoth, Brundt the Chieftain te ordenará subir a su barco.

text.en: Talk to Queen Sigrid.
text.es: Habla con Queen Sigrid.

chatOptions: 1 What is the matter, Your Majesty?

text.en: Talk to Brundt to get another seal of passage.
text.es: Habla con Brundt para conseguir otro sello de paso.

text.en: Bank before teleporting to Waterbirth. Bring prayer potions and a full load of food. Leave 1 space empty.
text.es: Guarda tus objetos en el banco antes de teletransportarte a Waterbirth. Lleva pociones de oración y comida suficiente. Deja 1 espacio libre.

text.en: Talk to Jarvald (on the western pier) and select the option Travel-Waterbirth to head to Waterbirth Island. If he says he's not taking you, you will have to talk to him first and get to the option where you ask "Can I come?"
text.es: Habla con Jarvald (en el muelle occidental) y selecciona la opción Travel-Waterbirth para dirigirte a Waterbirth Island. Si dice que no te va a llevar, tendrás que hablar con él de nuevo hasta llegar a la opción donde preguntas "¿Puedo ir contigo?"

text.en: Talk to Bardur near the cave entrance for a rope.
text.es: Habla con Bardur cerca de la entrada de la cueva para conseguir una cuerda.

chatOptions: 1 Could it be an old man echoing from underground?

text.en: Make your way to the southwestern tip of the island and tie the rope on the hole.
text.es: Dirígete a la punta suroeste de la isla y ata la cuerda al agujero.

text.en: Climb-down the hole.
text.es: Baja por el agujero.

text.en: Talk to King Vargas.
text.es: Habla con King Vargas.

chatOptions: 1 Come on, this isn't the King Vargas I'm used to.

text.en: Lead King Vargas down the path to the north-east and go down the ladder.
text.es: Guía a King Vargas por el camino hacia el noreste y baja por la escalera.

text.en: Don't get too far ahead of King Vargas in the tunnels, or the dagannoth will get him and return him to the first chamber meaning you will have to start over. Staying close to King Vargas also ensures he will not be attacked so you won't have to feed him any food. It's recommended to turn off run while escorting King Vargas.
text.es: No te alejes demasiado de King Vargas en los túneles, o los dagannoth lo atraparán y lo devolverán a la primera cámara, lo que significa que tendrás que empezar de nuevo. Mantenerte cerca de King Vargas también asegura que no será atacado, así que no tendrás que darle comida. Se recomienda desactivar la carrera mientras escoltas a King Vargas.

text.en: Continue to the far-east side of the next tunnel, past the small obelisk, and climb up the ladder.
text.es: Continúa hacia el extremo este del siguiente túnel, pasando el pequeño obelisco, y sube por la escalera.

text.en: The next ladder to climb up is to the west, in this short tunnel dagannoth will spawn that prioritise attacking King Vargas, make sure you attack them so they will focus their attacks on you instead.
text.es: La siguiente escalera para subir está al oeste; en este túnel corto aparecerán dagannoth que priorizarán atacar a King Vargas, asegúrate de atacarlos para que centren sus ataques en ti.

text.en: Make your way through the last two short tunnels with rock lobsters and climb up the ladder.
text.es: Atraviesa los dos últimos túneles cortos con langostas de roca y sube por la escalera.

chatOptions: 1 Well, as quickly as you can, please.

text.en: Talk to Eir.
text.es: Habla con Eir.

chatOptions: 1 I'm not supposed to be here?
1 Can you at least explain where I am?
1 How do I get back then?

text.en: Talk to Nial Swiftfling.
text.es: Habla con Nial Swiftfling.

chatOptions: 1 The dagannoths are mounting a massive attack on nearby settlements.

text.en: Talk to Asleif Hamalsdotter.
text.es: Habla con Asleif Hamalsdotter.

chatOptions: 1 You realise they're waiting for a huge battle?
1 I don't recall that working out so well last time.

text.en: Talk to Eir.
text.es: Habla con Eir.

text.en: If the spiritual realm sequence is interrupted, speak with Brundt in the long hall in Rellekka to obtain a letter. Read the letter to return.
text.es: Si la secuencia del reino espiritual se interrumpe, habla con Brundt en el salón principal de Rellekka para obtener una carta. Lee la carta para regresar.

text.en: Speak to Brundt the Chieftain.
text.es: Habla con Brundt the Chieftain.

text.en: Talk to King Vargas.
text.es: Habla con King Vargas.

text.en: Talk to Princess Astrid or Prince Brand.
text.es: Habla con Princess Astrid o Prince Brand.

text.en: Talk to Brundt to continue and bank.
text.es: Habla con Brundt para continuar y guardar tus objetos en el banco.

chatOptions: 2 Actually, could you drop me off at the bank on Etceteria?

text.en: Prepare for a fight with Dagannoth sentinels and the Dagannoth Mother.
text.es: Prepárate para una lucha contra los Dagannoth sentinels y la Dagannoth Mother.

text.en: Talk to Brundt in the long hall in Rellekka when you are ready.
text.es: Habla con Brundt en el salón principal de Rellekka cuando estés listo.

chatOptions: 2 Ask about the war against the daggermouths.

text.en: Talk to Baba Yaga on the boat.
text.es: Habla con Baba Yaga en el barco.

text.en: Climb down the hole on the southwestern tip of the island.
text.es: Baja por el agujero en la punta suroeste de la isla.

text.en: Enter the southern tunnel.
text.es: Entra en el túnel sur.

text.en: Enter the next tunnel to fight the Dagannoth sentinels.
text.es: Entra en el siguiente túnel para luchar contra los Dagannoth sentinels.

text.en: After defeating the sentinels, you can go to bank to get more food. You don't need to fight the sentinels again. Also you don't need the tablets or the seal of passage for the fights (saves you a few slots for food).
text.es: Tras derrotar a los sentinels, puedes ir al banco para conseguir más comida. No necesitas volver a luchar contra los sentinels. Tampoco necesitas las tablillas ni el sello de paso para las peleas (te ahorra algunos espacios para comida).

text.en: Continue to the next tunnel.
text.es: Continúa hacia el siguiente túnel.

text.en: Go to the south-east intersection and enter the tunnel entrance.
text.es: Ve hasta la intersección del sureste y entra por la entrada del túnel.

text.en: Use the picture on the right for reference.
text.es: Usa la imagen de la derecha como referencia.

text.en: Proceed south and enter the tunnel.
text.es: Continúa hacia el sur y entra en el túnel.

text.en: Go through the next tunnel and select either chat option.
text.es: Atraviesa el siguiente túnel y selecciona cualquiera de las opciones de diálogo.

text.en: Start the battle with Balmung (the special weapon you received from Brundt) and kill the Dagannoth Mother, switching styles according to her colour.
text.es: Comienza la batalla con Balmung (el arma especial que recibiste de Brundt) y mata a la Dagannoth Mother, cambiando de estilo según su color.

text.en: If you have trouble telling between the colours (specially red/orange/yellow), you can use the chatbox. It will say "The dagannoth changes to red..." etc.
text.es: Si tienes problemas para distinguir los colores (especialmente rojo/naranja/amarillo), puedes usar el cuadro de chat. Dirá "The dagannoth changes to red..." etc.

rows: Melee attacks with Balmung or any slashing weapon

text.en: After the Dagannoth Mother has been defeated, go back to the previous room, collect the pickaxe, plank, and tinderbox and use them to collapse one of the pillars.
text.es: Tras derrotar a la Dagannoth Mother, vuelve a la sala anterior, recoge el pico, la tabla y el yesquero, y úsalos para derribar uno de los pilares.

text.en: Talk to Eir.
text.es: Habla con Eir.

chatOptions: 1 I seem to have died again.

text.en: Check the bodies and finish chat.
text.es: Revisa los cuerpos y termina la conversación.

text.en: Talk with Baba Yaga and Koschei.
text.es: Habla con Baba Yaga y Koschei.

text.en: Attempt to climb up the rope.
text.es: Intenta subir por la cuerda.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!

text.en: Speak to Brundt to receive your reward.
text.es: Habla con Brundt para recibir tu recompensa.

chatOptions: 2 Ask about the war against the daggermouths.
